item.title: INTELCAPE: A Deep Learning-Powered System for Automated, High-Accuracy Crohn's Disease Diagnosis via Capsule Endoscopy.
item.description: Clinical gastroenterology and hepatology : the official clinical practice journal of the American Gastroenterological Association — Capsule endoscopy (CE) is a non-invasive technique for diagnosing Crohn's disease (CD); however, manual interpretation of CE videos is time-consuming and error-prone. We developed an artificial int...

item.title: Inflammatory bowel disease and extracellular matrix: when victim becomes double agent.
item.description: Inflammation research : official journal of the European Histamine Research Society ... [et al.] — Review - The extracellular matrix (ECM) represents an intricate network of proteins present in all organs, with specific physical and biochemical functions. ECM is composed of two distinct but connected ent...

item.title: Intestinal Ultrasound Scan in Acute Severe Ulcerative Colitis in children: a multicenter prospective study on behalf of the Porto IBD Working Group of ESPGHAN.
item.description: Gastroenterology — The aim of this study was to evaluate the potential role of intestinal ultrasound scan (IUS) in predicting short-term treatment outcomes in pediatric acute severe ulcerative colitis (ASUC). This wa...

item.title: Role of miR-338-3p and miR-378a-3p as regulators in Crohn's disease pathogenesis: Potential therapeutic implications in inflammatory bowel disease.
item.description: Life sciences — Epithelial cell-derived microRNAs (miRNAs) are increasingly recognized as contributors to inflammatory bowel disease (IBD) through altered epithelial permeability and inflammatory cytokine producti...

item.title: Why and when are activity scores and advanced ultrasound techniques needed in inflammatory bowel disease (IBD)?
item.description: Medical ultrasonography — Review - In addition to avoidance of radiation exposure, the main advantages of ultrasound diagnostics in inflammatory bowel disease (IBD) patients are its' immediate availability, also as a component of th...
